title: AMOLED
description: Removes colorful tint from some black textures, aswell as revamps the enchanting table and removes blue tint from glass.
body:
AMOLED is a minimalist resource pack that modifies key Minecraft textures for a desaturated, more uniform look.
This pack changes:
- Enchanting Table
- Obsidian
- Netherite Armor & Tools
- Glass & Glass Pane
